name: boilerplater
description: Extension to storage boilerplate snippets so they can be easily reused later

scripts.copy-tom: shx mkdir -p out/views/static/tom-select && shx cp node_modules/tom-select/dist/js/tom-select.complete.js out/views/static/tom-select && shx cp node_modules/tom-select/dist/css/tom-select.css out/views/static/tom-select
scripts.copy-sql: shx mkdir -p out/database/sql-js && shx cp node_modules/sql.js/dist/sql-wasm.js out/database/sql-js && shx cp node_modules/sql.js/dist/sql-wasm.wasm out/database/sql-js
scripts.compile: tsc -p ./ && npm run copy-sql && npm run copy-tom
scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
